files:
This section contains the contents of the repository's files.
name: Deploy to master
on: push: branches: - master workflow_dispatch:
jobs: deploy: runs-on: [self-hosted, jenkins-server]
steps: - name: Checkout code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Run remote script run: | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@10.1.117.228 << 'EOF' #!/bin/bash set -e # Exit immediately if a command exits with a non-zero status set -x # Print commands and their arguments as they are executed
echo "Starting deployment to master environment"
echo "Navigating to node_crm directory" cd /var/www/node_crm echo "Pulling latest changes from master branch" git reset --hard origin/master git pull origin master echo "Installing npm dependencies" npm install
echo "Displaying last 10 git commits" git log | head -10
echo "Navigating to common-module directory" cd /var/www/node_crm/src/commonModules/common-module echo "Resetting to origin/master" git reset --hard origin/master echo "Checking out master branch" git checkout master echo "Pulling latest changes for common-module" git pull origin master
echo "Restarting node-crm-master service with pm2" pm2 restart node_crm echo "Displaying last 15 git commits for common-module" git log | head -15
echo "Deployment to master completed successfully" EOF
name: Deploy to Pre-Prod
on: push: branches: - pre-prod workflow_dispatch:
jobs: deploy: runs-on: [self-hosted, jenkins-server]
steps: - name: Checkout code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Run remote script run: | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@10.1.106.143 << 'EOF' #!/bin/bash set -e # Exit immediately if a command exits with a non-zero status set -x # Print commands and their arguments as they are executed
echo "Starting deployment to pre-prod environment"
echo "Navigating to node_crm directory" cd /home/ubuntu/api_code/node_crm echo "Pulling latest changes from pre-prod branch" git reset --hard origin/pre-prod git pull origin pre-prod echo "Installing npm dependencies" npm install
echo "Displaying last 10 git commits" git log | head -10
echo "Navigating to common-module directory" cd /home/ubuntu/api_code/node_crm/src/commonModules/common-module echo "Resetting to origin/pre-prod" git reset --hard origin/pre-prod echo "Checking out pre-prod branch" git checkout pre-prod echo "Pulling latest changes for common-module" git pull origin pre-prod
echo "Restarting node_crm service with pm2" pm2 restart node_crm echo "Displaying last 15 git commits for common-module" git log | head -15
echo "Deployment to pre-prod completed successfully" EOF
name: Preprod Deployment
on: pull_request: types: - opened - synchronize - closed branches: - pre-prod
env: AWS_REGION: ap-south-1 ECR_REPOSITORY: ramfincorp/crm-backend BASE_PATH: /home/ubuntu/preprod/node_crm SERVICE_NAME: crm-backend GIT_BRANCH: pre-prod
jobs: build: if: github.event.pull_request.merged == true || github.event.pull_request.state == 'open' runs-on: [self-hosted, ramfin] outputs: IMAGE_TAG: ${{ steps.set_tag.outputs.IMAGE_TAG }} IS_PR: ${{ steps.check_pr.outputs.IS_PR }} ENV_NAME: ${{ steps.check_pr.outputs.ENV_NAME }}
steps: - name: Check if PR id: check_pr run: | if [[ "${{ github.event.action }}" == "closed" && "${{ github.event.pull_request.merged }}" == "true" ]]; then echo "IS_PR=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT echo "ENV_NAME=preprod" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT else echo "IS_PR=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT echo "ENV_NAME=dev" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT fi
- name: Set image tag id: set_tag run: | if [[ "${{ github.event.action }}" == "closed" && "${{ github.event.pull_request.merged }}" == "true" ]]; then echo "IMAGE_TAG=1.${{ github.run_number }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT else echo "IMAGE_TAG=1.${{ github.run_number }}-pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT fi
- name: Configure AWS credentials uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v2 with: aws-region: ${{ env.AWS_REGION }} role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_ARN }}
- name: Login to Amazon ECR shell: bash run: | aws ecr get-login-password --region ${{ env.AWS_REGION }} \ | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 361795871686.dkr.ecr.${{ env.AWS_REGION }}.amazonaws.com
- name: Checkout code run: | cd ${{ env.BASE_PATH }} git reset --hard HEAD git clean -fd git fetch origin if [[ "${{ github.event.action }}" == "closed" && "${{ github.event.pull_request.merged }}" == "true" ]]; then git checkout ${{ env.GIT_BRANCH }} git pull origin ${{ env.GIT_BRANCH }} else git checkout ${{ github.head_ref }} git pull origin ${{ github.head_ref }} fi
cd ${{ env.BASE_PATH }}/src/commonModules/common-module git checkout master git pull origin master
- name: Build and Push Docker image shell: bash run: | cd ${{ env.BASE_PATH }} IMAGE_NAME=361795871686.dkr.ecr.${{ env.AWS_REGION }}.amazonaws.com/${{ env.ECR_REPOSITORY }}:${{ steps.set_tag.outputs.IMAGE_TAG }}
echo "Building Image: ${IMAGE_NAME}" docker build \ -t "${IMAGE_NAME}" \ --platform linux/amd64 \ -f Dockerfile .
echo "Pushing image: ${IMAGE_NAME}" docker push "${IMAGE_NAME}"
- name: Create and push git release tag if: github.event.action == 'closed' && github.event.pull_request.merged == true run: | cd ${{ env.BASE_PATH }} TAG_NAME="${{ steps.set_tag.outputs.IMAGE_TAG }}" echo "Creating and pushing git tag: ${TAG_NAME}" git tag "${TAG_NAME}" git push origin "${TAG_NAME}"
deploy: needs: build name: Deploy if: github.event.pull_request.merged == true || github.event.pull_request.state == 'open' runs-on: [self-hosted, ramfin] env: ENV_NAME: ${{ needs.build.outputs.ENV_NAME }} steps: - name: Checkout code run: | cd ${{ env.BASE_PATH }} git reset --hard HEAD git clean -fd git fetch origin if [[ "${{ needs.build.outputs.IS_PR }}" == "true" ]]; then git checkout ${{ github.head_ref }} git pull origin ${{ github.head_ref }} else git checkout ${{ env.GIT_BRANCH }} git pull origin ${{ env.GIT_BRANCH }} fi
- name: Configure AWS credentials uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v2 with: aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.RF_DEV_ACCESS_KEY }} aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.RF_DEV_ACCESS_SECRET }} aws-region: ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}
- name: Verify Kubernetes Context run: | if [[ "${{ needs.build.outputs.IS_PR }}" == "true" ]]; then CONTEXT="arn:aws:eks:ap-south-1:361795871686:cluster/rf-dev-eks-cluster" else CONTEXT="arn:aws:eks:ap-south-1:361795871686:cluster/pre-prod-eks-cluster" fi kubectl config use-context "${CONTEXT}" if ! kubectl cluster-info > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Error: Could not connect to the Kubernetes cluster context." exit 1 fi
- name: Deploy using deploy.sh run: | cd ${{ env.BASE_PATH }}/cicd chmod +x deploy.sh if [[ "${{ needs.build.outputs.IS_PR }}" == "true" ]]; then NAMESPACE="${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }}-pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" else NAMESPACE="${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }}-integration" fi ./deploy.sh ${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }} ${{ needs.build.outputs.IMAGE_TAG }} "${NAMESPACE}"
name: UAT Deployment
on: workflow_dispatch: inputs: image_tag: description: 'Docker image tag to deploy (e.g., 1.123)' required: true type: string
env: AWS_REGION: ap-south-1 BASE_PATH: /home/ubuntu/preprod/node_crm SERVICE_NAME: crm-backend
jobs: deploy: name: Deploy runs-on: [self-hosted, ramfin] env: ENV_NAME: uat steps: - name: Checkout code run: | cd ${{ env.BASE_PATH }} git reset --hard HEAD git clean -fd git fetch origin git checkout ${{ github.ref_name }} git pull origin ${{ github.ref_name }}
- name: Configure AWS credentials uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v2 with: aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.RF_DEV_ACCESS_KEY }} aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.RF_DEV_ACCESS_SECRET }} aws-region: ${{ env.AWS_REGION }}
- name: Verify Kubernetes Context run: | CONTEXT="arn:aws:eks:ap-south-1:361795871686:cluster/pre-prod-eks-cluster" kubectl config use-context "${CONTEXT}" if ! kubectl cluster-info > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Error: Could not connect to the Kubernetes cluster context." exit 1 fi
- name: Deploy using deploy.sh run: | cd ${{ env.BASE_PATH }}/cicd chmod +x deploy.sh NAMESPACE="${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }}-uat" ./deploy.sh ${{ env.SERVICE_NAME }} ${{ github.event.inputs.image_tag }} "${NAMESPACE}"
# Codeowners for this repo
* @rajesh-cod3 @arvind-ramfincorp @RajoriyaSandeepa
#!/bin/sh # This script is executed after a commit is made in Git. # Cross-platform TTY check if [ -e "/dev/tty" ]; then TTY_OUTPUT="/dev/tty" else TTY_OUTPUT="/dev/stdout" fi
echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" # Display commit information in Git's original format commit_hash=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) commit_message=$(git log -1 --pretty=format:"%s") branch=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)
# Show Git-style commit output to TTY echo "[$branch $commit_hash] $commit_message" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" git show --stat --format="" HEAD > "$TTY_OUTPUT"
echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "✓ Commit complete" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "────────────────────────────────────────" > "$TTY_OUTPUT"
# Protected branch check is_protected_branch() { protected_branches=${PROTECTED_BRANCHES:-"main master"} for protected_branch in $protected_branches; do if [ "$branch" = "$protected_branch" ]; then return 0 fi done return 1 }
# Push helper function perform_push() { # Check if branch has upstream if ! git rev-parse --abbrev-ref "$branch@{upstream}" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "• Branch '$branch' has no upstream. Setting upstream to origin/$branch..." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" git push --set-upstream origin "$branch" else echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" git push fi
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "✓ Push complete" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" else echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "✗ Push failed" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" exit 1 fi }
# Push logic with upstream handling attempt_push_prompt() { echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" printf "▶ Do you want to push to '$branch' immediately after this commit? (Y/n): " > "$TTY_OUTPUT" read -r response < "$TTY_OUTPUT" if [ "$response" != "n" ] && [ "$response" != "N" ]; then echo "↑ Pushing to remote repository ($branch)..." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" perform_push else echo "⏭ Skipped push. You can push manually later." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" fi }
# Interactive shell if [ -t 0 ]; then if is_protected_branch; then echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "! Warning: Auto-push skipped on protected branch: $branch" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" else attempt_push_prompt fi else echo "• Non-interactive shell detected" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" if [ -e "/dev/tty" ] && ! is_protected_branch; then echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" printf "▶ Do you want to push to '$branch' immediately after this commit? (Y/n): " > "$TTY_OUTPUT" read -r response < "$TTY_OUTPUT" if [ "$response" != "n" ] && [ "$response" != "N" ]; then echo "↑ Pushing to remote repository ($branch)..." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" perform_push else echo "⏭ Skipped push. You can push manually later." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" fi else # Check for GIT_AUTO_PUSH first, regardless of protected branch status if [ "$GIT_AUTO_PUSH" = "1" ]; then if is_protected_branch; then echo "! WARNING: Auto-pushing to protected branch '$branch' due to GIT_AUTO_PUSH=1" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" fi echo "↑ Auto-pushing to remote repository ($branch) based on GIT_AUTO_PUSH environment variable..." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" perform_push elif [ -n "$GIT_AUTO_PUSH" ]; then echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "! Invalid value for GIT_AUTO_PUSH. Only '1' is allowed to enable auto-push." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" elif is_protected_branch; then echo "! Warning: Auto-push skipped on protected branch: $branch" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" elif [ -e "/dev/tty" ]; then echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" printf "▶ Do you want to push to '$branch' immediately after this commit? (Y/n): " > "$TTY_OUTPUT" read -r response < "$TTY_OUTPUT" if [ "$response" != "n" ] && [ "$response" != "N" ]; then echo "↑ Pushing to remote repository ($branch)..." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" perform_push else echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "⏭ Skipped push. You can push manually later." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" fi else # Non-interactive shell without /dev/tty echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "! Non-interactive shell without /dev/tty detected. Skipping push prompt." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" fi fi fi
# Final summary echo "────────────────────────────────────────" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "▶ SUMMARY:" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" # Exit with success exit 0
#!/bin/sh # This script is executed before a commit is made. # Cross-platform TTY check if [ -e "/dev/tty" ]; then TTY_OUTPUT="/dev/tty" else TTY_OUTPUT="/dev/stdout" fi echo "────────────────────────────────────────" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" echo "▶ Pre-commit validation started..." > "$TTY_OUTPUT"
# Run lint-staged if ! command -v npx > /dev/null || ! npx --no-install lint-staged --version > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "✗ 'lint-staged' is not installed or not configured. Please install and configure it before committing." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" exit 1 fi
npm run lint-staged > /dev/null 2>&1 if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "✗ Lint-staged checks failed - please fix issues" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" npm run lint-staged > "$TTY_OUTPUT" 2>&1 # Show output on failure exit 1 else echo "✓ Lint-staged passed" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" fi
# Type check npm run typecheck > /dev/null 2>&1 if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "✗ Type validation failed - please resolve type errors" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" npm run typecheck > "$TTY_OUTPUT" 2>&1 # Show output on failure exit 1 else echo "✓ Type checking passed" > "$TTY_OUTPUT" fi
echo "✓ All checks passed. Committing..." > "$TTY_OUTPUT" exit 0
apiVersion: apps/v1 kind: Deployment metadata: name: {{ .Values.name }} namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }} spec: replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }} selector: matchLabels: app: {{ .Values.name }} template: metadata: labels: app: {{ .Values.name }} spec: containers: - name: {{ .Values.name }} image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }} imagePullPolicy: Always ports: - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.port }} volumeMounts: - name: env-secret mountPath: /app/.env subPath: .env env: - name: NODE_ENV value: "production" resources: {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }} - name: redis image: redis:7-alpine resources: {{- toYaml .Values.redis.resources | nindent 12 }} volumes: - name: env-secret secret: secretName: {{ .Values.envSecretName | default (printf "%s-env" .Values.name) }}
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2 kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler metadata: name: {{ .Values.name }}-hpa namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }} spec: scaleTargetRef: apiVersion: apps/v1 kind: Deployment name: {{ .Values.name }} minReplicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }} maxReplicas: 5 metrics: - type: Resource resource: name: cpu target: type: Utilization averageUtilization: 70 - type: Resource resource: name: memory target: type: Utilization averageUtilization: 80
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1 kind: HTTPRoute metadata: name: {{ .Values.name }}-route namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }} labels: app: {{ .Values.name }} spec: parentRefs: - name: {{ .Values.gateway.name }} namespace: {{ .Values.gateway.namespace | default .Values.name }} hostnames: {{- range .Values.gateway.hosts }} - {{ . | quote }} {{- end }} rules: - matches: - path: type: PathPrefix value: / backendRefs: - name: {{ .Values.service.name }} port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
apiVersion: v1 kind: Service metadata: name: {{ .Values.service.name }} namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }} labels: app: {{ .Values.name }} app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: "Helm" annotations: meta.helm.sh/release-name: {{ .Release.Name }} meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }} spec: selector: app: {{ .Values.name }} ports: - protocol: TCP port: 80 targetPort: {{ .Values.service.port }} type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
apiVersion: v2 name: crm-backend version: 0.1.0 description: A Helm chart for deploying the crm-backend service appVersion: "1.0" keywords: - backend - crm - kubernetes maintainers: - name: Ramfincorp
replicaCount: 1
name: crm-backend image: repository: 361795871686.dkr.ecr.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/ramfincorp/crm-backend tag: "1.0" pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
service: name: crm-backend-svc type: ClusterIP port: 8080
envSecretName: "crm-backend-env"
gateway: name: "envoy-gateway" namespace: "envoy-system" hosts: - "crm-backend.preprod.ramfincorp.com"
redis: resources: requests: cpu: "100m" memory: "256Mi" limits: cpu: "200m" memory: "256Mi"
probe: liveness: endpoint: "/health" initialDelaySeconds: 120 periodSeconds: 30
resources: requests: memory: "1Gi" cpu: "1000m" limits: memory: "1Gi" cpu: "1000m"
#!/usr/bin/env bash
serviceName="${1}" imageTag="${2}" if [ -z "${serviceName}" ] || [ -z "${imageTag}" ]; then echo "Usage: $0 [namespace]" exit 1 fi namespace="${3}"
echo "Deploying ${serviceName} with image tag ${imageTag} in namespace: ${namespace}"
ENV_FILE_PATH="/home/ubuntu/preprod/env/${serviceName}-${ENV_NAME}-env"
echo "Creating/Updating secret ${serviceName}-env from ${ENV_FILE_PATH} in namespace: ${namespace}" kubectl create namespace "${namespace}" --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - kubectl create secret generic "${serviceName}-env" \ --from-file=.env="${ENV_FILE_PATH}" \ --namespace "${namespace}" \ --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
HELM_ARGS=( --set "image.tag=${imageTag}" --namespace "${namespace}" --create-namespace -f ./helm/values.yaml )
HELM_ARGS+=( --set "gateway.hosts[0]=${namespace}.ramfincorp.com" )
helm upgrade --install \ "${serviceName}" "./helm" \ "${HELM_ARGS[@]}"
import { Sequelize } from "sequelize"; import dbConfigs from "./config.js";
apiVersion: apps/v1 kind: Deployment metadata: name: crm-backend spec: replicas: 1 selector: matchLabels: app: crm-backend template: metadata: labels: app: crm-backend spec: containers: - name: crm-backend image: 361795871686.dkr.ecr.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/ramfincorp/crm-backend:1.0 command: ["tail", "-f", "/dev/null"] ports: - containerPort: 8080 env: - name: NODE_ENV value: "production" resources: limits: memory: "512Mi" cpu: "500m" - name: redis-crm image: redis:7-alpine ports: - containerPort: 6379

export interface ILoan { loanID?: number // Auto-incrementing primary key leadID: number lenderID?: number loanNo: string // varchar(255) customerID: number approvalID?: number // Double with precision (10,2) disbursalAmount: number
disbursalDate?: Date // Text for date disbursalTime?: string // Time as a string disbursalRefrenceNo?: string // varchar(255) accountNo: string // varchar(100) accountType: string // varchar(100) bankIfsc: string // varchar(100) bank: string // varchar(255) bankBranch: string // varchar(255) chequeDetails: string // varchar(255) pdDate: string // date as a string pdDoneBy: string // varchar(100) repayDate?: Date // Double with precision (10,2) deduction: number
remarks: string // varchar(255)
// Enum values can be represented as union types of possible string values status: | 'Disbursed' | 'Disbursal Sheet Send' | 'Failed' | 'Refund' | 'Bank Update Rejected' | 'Disbursal Approved' | 'Bank Update Hold'
rejReason?: string // varchar(256) companyAccountNo: string // varchar(255) ip: string // varchar(100) disbursedBy: number // Integer (ID of the user who disbursed)
createdDate?: Date // datetime represented as Date object allocate_date?: Date // datetime represented as Date object allocated_by?: string // varchar(64)
// Enum for `is_manual` represented as a union type of possible values is_manual?: '0' | '1'
manual_date?: string // varchar(64) utr?: string // varchar(128) payout_status?: 1 | 2 cooling_period_flag?: 0 | 1 cooling_period_date?: Date // datetime represented as Date object } ⋮---- loanID?: number // Auto-incrementing primary key ⋮---- loanNo: string // varchar(255) ⋮---- // Double with precision (10,2) ⋮---- disbursalDate?: Date // Text for date disbursalTime?: string // Time as a string disbursalRefrenceNo?: string // varchar(255) accountNo: string // varchar(100) accountType: string // varchar(100) bankIfsc: string // varchar(100) bank: string // varchar(255) bankBranch: string // varchar(255) chequeDetails: string // varchar(255) pdDate: string // date as a string pdDoneBy: string // varchar(100) ⋮---- // Double with precision (10,2) ⋮---- remarks: string // varchar(255) ⋮---- // Enum values can be represented as union types of possible string values ⋮---- rejReason?: string // varchar(256) companyAccountNo: string // varchar(255) ip: string // varchar(100) disbursedBy: number // Integer (ID of the user who disbursed) ⋮---- createdDate?: Date // datetime represented as Date object allocate_date?: Date // datetime represented as Date object allocated_by?: string // varchar(64) ⋮---- // Enum for `is_manual` represented as a union type of possible values ⋮---- manual_date?: string // varchar(64) utr?: string // varchar(128) ⋮---- cooling_period_date?: Date // datetime represented as Date object ⋮---- export type TSelectLoan = keyof ILoan ⋮---- export interface ReplaceHtmlParams { data: any html: string defaultDate?: string } ⋮---- export interface ICalculateRepayAmountIpc { totalPayableAmount: number repayDate: Date totalInterest: number dpdCharges: number principalAmount: number totalAmount: number totalAmountInterest: number totalAmountDpdCharge: number totalAmountPrincipal: number }

collectedInterest: number collectedPenality: number excessAmount: number discountWaiverAmount?: number } ⋮---- export interface CollectionCalculationResult { amounts: CollectionAmounts finalStatus: string returnCode: number } ⋮---- /** * Collection priority order: Interest -> Principal -> Penalty * This ensures interest is collected first, then principal, then penalties */ export enum CollectionPriority { INTEREST = 1, PRINCIPAL = 2, PENALTY = 3, } ⋮---- /** * Applies collected amount according to priority (Interest -> Principal -> Penalty) * Uses precise arithmetic to avoid rounding errors during calculations */ function applyCollectionByPriority( collectedAmount: number, totalInterest: number, principalAmount: number, penalityCharge: number, ): ⋮---- // Work with precise values throughout calculation ⋮---- // Step 1: Collect interest first ⋮---- // Step 2: Collect principal next ⋮---- // Step 3: Collect penalty last ⋮---- // Apply precise rounding only at the end ⋮---- /** * Calculates collection amounts for closed status */ export function calculateClosedCollection( collectedAmount: number, repaymentAmount: number, principalAmount: number, totalInterest: number, penalityCharge: number, ): CollectionAmounts ⋮---- discountWaiverAmount: roundDecimal(remainingAmount), // If closed, remaining amount is considered as discount/waiver ⋮---- /** * Calculates collection amounts for part payment status */ export function calculatePartPaymentCollection( collectedAmount: number, repaymentAmount: number, principalAmount: number, totalInterest: number, penalityCharge: number, totalInterestActual: number, penalityChargeActual: number, ): ⋮---- // If collected amount covers full repayment, it should be closed ⋮---- // Apply collection by priority ⋮---- // Handle edge case: if no interest or principal collected, apply to penalty from actual amounts ⋮---- excessAmount: 0, // No excess in part payment ⋮---- discountWaiverAmount: 0, // No discount/waiver in part payment ⋮---- /** * Calculates collection amounts for settlement status */ export function calculateSettlementCollection( collectedAmount: number, repaymentAmount: number, principalAmount: number, totalInterest: number, penalityCharge: number, totalInterestActual: number, penalityChargeActual: number, ): CollectionAmounts ⋮---- // Apply collection by priority for settlements ⋮---- // For settlements, calculate proper closing balance accounting for waivers/discounts ⋮---- // Excess payment scenario - loan is fully settled with excess ⋮---- discountWaiverAmount: 0, // No discount when there's excess ⋮---- // Settlement with shortfall - apply discount/waiver ⋮---- closingBalance: 0, // Settlement closes the account ⋮---- principalAmount: 0, // No remaining principal in settlement totalInterest: 0, // No remaining interest in settlement penalityCharge: 0, // No remaining penalty in settlement ⋮---- discountWaiverAmount: roundDecimal(shortfall), // Shortfall is waived off ⋮---- /** * Main collection calculation function that determines the correct calculation method */ export function calculateCollectionByStatus( status: CollectionStatus, collectedAmount: number, repaymentAmount: number, principalAmount: number, totalInterest: number, penalityCharge: number, totalInterestActual: number, penalityChargeActual: number, ): ⋮---- // Validate inputs ⋮---- returnCode: 3, // Invalid amount ⋮---- let returnCode = 1 // Success ⋮---- returnCode = 2 // Insufficient amount ⋮---- returnCode = 3 // Invalid status ⋮---- /** * Returns default/empty amounts structure */ function getDefaultAmounts(): CollectionAmounts ⋮---- /** * Creates a collection object that matches the ICollection interface */ export function createCollectionObject( baseData: Partial, amounts: CollectionAmounts, ): Partial

charges from collection date // If no principal left, no new interest should be calculated ⋮---- totalInterest = interestBalance + newInterest // Include any existing interest balance ⋮---- // Calculate only new DPD charges (excluding penalty since closing_balance already includes existing penalties) // If no principal left, no new DPD charges should be calculated ⋮---- charges = penaltyBalance + newDpdCharges + newPenaltyCharge // Total charges including existing penalty ⋮---- // totalRepayAmount = closing_balance (which includes existing balances) + new interest + new DPD charges + new penalty

/** * Financial rounding strategies */ export enum RoundingStrategy { BANKERS = 'bankers', // Round to nearest even (banker's rounding) - most fair for financial calculations HALF_UP = 'half_up', // Round 0.5 up (traditional rounding) HALF_DOWN = 'half_down', // Round 0.5 down CEIL = 'ceil', // Always round up FLOOR = 'floor', // Always round down } ⋮---- BANKERS = 'bankers', // Round to nearest even (banker's rounding) - most fair for financial calculations HALF_UP = 'half_up', // Round 0.5 up (traditional rounding) HALF_DOWN = 'half_down', // Round 0.5 down CEIL = 'ceil', // Always round up FLOOR = 'floor', // Always round down ⋮---- /** * Precise financial rounding - handles floating point precision issues * and supports multiple rounding strategies for financial calculations * @param value - The number to round * @param decimals - Number of decimal places (default: 0) * @param strategy - Rounding strategy to use (default: CEIL) * @returns Precisely rounded number */ export function roundDecimal( value: number, decimals: number = 0, strategy: RoundingStrategy = RoundingStrategy.CEIL, ): number ⋮---- // Handle edge cases ⋮---- // Banker's rounding (round to nearest even) - most fair for financial calculations // This minimizes bias over many transactions ⋮---- // Traditional rounding (0.5 rounds up) ⋮---- // Round 0.5 down ⋮---- // Always round up ⋮---- // Always round down ⋮---- // Default to banker's rounding ⋮---- /** * Convenience function for banker's rounding (recommended for financial calculations) * @param value - The number to round * @param decimals - Number of decimal places (default: 0) * @returns Precisely rounded number using banker's rounding */ export function financialRound(value: number, decimals: number = 0): number ⋮---- /** * Convenience function for ceiling rounding (always round up) * @param value - The number to round * @param decimals - Number of decimal places (default: 0) * @returns Precisely rounded number using ceiling rounding */ export function ceilRound(value: number, decimals: number = 0): number ⋮---- /** * Convenience function for floor rounding (always round down) * @param value - The number to round * @param decimals - Number of decimal places (default: 0) * @returns Precisely rounded number using floor rounding */ export function floorRound(value: number, decimals: number = 0): number ⋮---- /** * Formats a number according to Indian numbering system (lakhs and crores) * Handles all cases from thousands to crores with proper comma placement * Examples: * - 1234 → 1,234 (thousands) * - 12345 → 12,345 (ten thousands) * - 123456 → 1,23,456 (lakhs) * - 1234567 → 12,34,567 (ten lakhs) * - 12345678 → 1,23,45,678 (crores) * - 123456789 → 12,34,56,789 (ten crores) * @param value - The number to format * @returns Formatted string with Indian numbering system */ export function formatIndianNumber(value: number): string ⋮---- // Handle edge cases ⋮---- // Handle negative numbers ⋮---- // Convert to string and split into integer and decimal parts ⋮---- // For numbers less than 1000, no comma formatting needed ⋮---- // Apply Indian numbering system formatting // First, separate the last 3 digits (hundreds place) ⋮---- // Split remaining digits into groups of 2 from right to left ⋮---- // Process remaining digits in groups of 2 from right to left ⋮---- groups.unshift(group) // Add to the beginning to maintain order ⋮---- // Combine all groups with commas ⋮---- // Add back decimal part if exists ⋮---- // Add negative sign if needed ⋮---- /** * Rounds a number and formats it according to Indian numbering system * Enhanced with better error handling and validation * @param value - The number to round and format * @param decimals - Number of decimal places (default: 0, max: 10) * @returns Formatted string with Indian numbering system */ export function roundAndFormatIndian(value: number, decimals: number = 0): string ⋮---- // Input validation ⋮---- // Clamp decimals to reasonable range ⋮---- // Round the value first ⋮---- // Format using Indian numbering system

Please repay on or before due date to avoid penal charges.

Sanction Letter
Date: <%= sanctionDate %>
Dear <%= applicantName %>,
Thank you for your Loan Application made through ramfincorp.com. We are pleased to sanction you a loan as per the enclosed terms and Schedule of Loan Sanction Terms:
Please note that this sanction letter is issued in response to your loan application and based on the information you have provided to us. The Processing fees as charged is mentioned in the schedule and the same will be deducted from your loan amount upfront. You are under no obligation to accept the sanctioned loan. If you do not accept the sanction letter and the enclosed agreement your loan application will be considered withdrawn and you will not be liable to pay any processing fees/charges.
If you wish to accept the sanction letter, please go through the enclosed Loan agreement and confirm your acceptance of the agreement and the Terms of Sanction letter mentioned above. The loan will be disbursed to your below mentioned bank account after confirmation and acceptance of this sanction letter.
The comprehensive terms and conditions of your loan:
Your Bank Account Details:
Bank Name: <%= bankName %>
Account No: <%= accountNumber %>
Bank IFSC Code: <%= ifscCode %>
Loan Details:
Amount: Rs. <%= loanAmount %>
Tenor: <%= loanTenor %> Months
Product: EMI Loan
Rate of Interest: <%= interestRate %> % per annum
Interest Calculation and Payment:
Interest will be charged from the date of disbursal until the payment date. The calculation is based on the daily outstanding principal amount.
You are required to repay the loan amount along with the accrued interest on or before the due date.
The repayment amount can be made via https://www.ramfincorp.com/pay-now/, and the payment should be credited to our account by <%= repaymentDueDate %>.
Penalty and Late Payment:
In case of delay in repayment beyond the due date, Penal interest is <%= penalInterest %> % daily. However, timely repayment is recommended to avoid any potential inconveniences. A one-time penalty charge is 590. The GST amount is included.
Prepayment Option:
You have the flexibility to prepay the loan amount before the due date without incurring any prepayment charges.
Disbursement Process and Documentation:
The approved loan amount will be disbursed directly to your designated bank account upon completion of the necessary documentation and verification procedures.
We kindly request accurate and up-to-date personal and financial information to facilitate a smooth and prompt loan processing experience.
Collateral and Security:
This Loan is unsecured, meaning there is no requirement for collateral. However, as a security, a security cheque will be deposited.
Communication and Updates:
Our primary mode of communication will be via the contact details provided during the application process. You will receive all loan-related correspondence through these channels.
Privacy and Data Security:
The security of your personal and financial information is of utmost importance to us. We adhere to stringent data protection laws to ensure the confidentiality and privacy of your information.
Default And Consequences:
In the event of failure to repay the loan by the due date, the loan shall attract interest for the defaulted period also. Additionally, defaulting on the loan may impact your credit rating.
Legal Jurisdiction:
This loan agreement falls under the jurisdiction of New Delhi and is governed by the laws of the State of Delhi.
Customer Support:
Should you have any questions, concerns, or require further clarification, our dedicated customer support team is readily available at +91 98999-85495.
We genuinely appreciate your trust in R K Bansal Finance Pvt. Ltd. as your financial partner. Our mission is to ensure your borrowing experience is efficient and transparent, helping you navigate your financial requirements with ease. By accepting this loan, you acknowledge and agree to the terms and conditions outlined in this letter.
Thank you for choosing us for your financial needs. We look forward to assisting you and making your financial journey a success.
Warm regards,
{Signature}
R K Bansal Finance Pvt. Ltd.

provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 (as amended up to date) bearing CIN-{lenderCinNo}, having its registered office at
{lenderAddress} (hereinafter referred “Lender”); and between Borrower / applicant <%= data.productID==2 ? ` to this loan agreement. The lender and borrower details are described in Schedule “A” & “B” under of this loan agreement.` : ` specified in Schedule “B” (hereinafter referred to as the “Borrower”). The details of the Lender and Borrower are described in Schedule “A” and “B” of this Loan Agreement.` %>
<%= data.productID==2 ? `{The both parties are listed in Schedule-“A” & “B" (being a First Party refer “Lender” and being a second party refer “Borrower”) to this Agreement are hereinafter collectively referred to as the “Parties” and individually referred to as the “Party”, which expression shall, unless it be repugnant to the subject or context thereof, be deemed to mean and include its successors and assigns and include his / her / its / their respective Legal heirs, executors, administrators, legal representatives, successors, permitted assigns, partner(s) for the time being, including the legal representatives of the deceased partner(s), if any. }` : `The Lender and the Borrower, collectively referred to as the “Parties” and individually as a “Party”, which expression shall, unless repugnant to the subject or context, be deemed to mean and include their successors, assigns, legal heirs, executors, administrators, legal representatives, permitted assigns, and partners, including the legal representatives of deceased partners, if any` %>
WHEREAS The Lender is a RBI approved Non-Banking Financial company engaged in the business of providing loans. <%= data.productID==2 ? ` The borrower has use digital platform of the lender to apply loan application form electronically. The borrower has submitted each and every details of her/his KYC and personal data with the loan application. The loan request of the borrower may be sent via website or email along with all financial and personal details, and basis of the details provided by the borrower, the lender has make due diligent and KYC check to meet out standard policy of loan approval and disbursement.` : `The Borrower has applied for a loan using the Lender’s digital platform and has submitted all necessary KYC and personal data with the loan application. Based on the information provided and after conducting due diligence and KYC checks, the Lender has approved the loan request` %>
WHEREAS
<%= data.productID==2 ? `The Borrower(s) is/are employed, salaried, professional, or self-employed individual(s) as stated in the loan application and are in need of funds for the purpose described in the Sanction Letter. The Borrower(s) has/have approached the Lender to avail the loan facility. Pursuant to discussions between the Borrower and the Lender, the Lender has agreed to provide the loan in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement.` : `The Borrower is an employed, salaried, professional, or self-employed individual seeking funds for the purpose described in the Sanction Letter and has approached the Lender to avail the loan facility. The Lender has agreed to provide the loan in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement.` %>
NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the representations, warranties, mutual agreements and covenants set forth in this Agreement, the Lender and Borrower agree as follows:
<%= data.productID==2 ? `The lender reserves its right to refuse or reject any Loan Application notwithstanding the applicants satisfying the eligibility criteria, if any, set by the lender for the approval of the Loan. The Borrower, who intends to obtain Loan facilities from the lender either once or multiple times, agrees and abides by terms and conditions as amended from time to time.` : `The Lender reserves the right to refuse or reject any loan application, regardless of whether the applicant meets the eligibility criteria established by the Lender. This decision is final and binding.` %>
<%= data.productID==2 ? `The Borrower further agrees to execute this agreement and such necessary documents or provide such necessary consent either orally or in writing, as may be deemed necessary by the lender to give effect to the terms of this agreement. These terms and conditions as agreed by the borrower and the lender shall be applicable and binding on the borrower in respect of any and all kinds of Loans approved/disbursed by the lender in favour of the borrower, as amended from time to time.` : `The Borrower who seeks to obtain a loan facility from the Lender, whether for a single loan or multiple loans, agrees to comply with the terms and conditions outlined in this Agreement, as well as any amendments made from time to time.` %>
<%= data.productID==2 ? `The present agreement is legally enforceable upon the borrower before court of law, and if the borrower failed to repay the outstanding amount of the lender, the lender i.e. company shall be entitled to claim legitimate due from the borrower before the appropriate forum at cost and consequences of the borrower.`: `The Borrower agrees to execute this Agreement and any additional documents or provide necessary consents, either orally or in writing, as required by the Lender to effectuate the terms of this Agreement. These terms and conditions will be applicable and binding on the Borrower with respect to all loans approved and disbursed by the Lender.` %>
<% if (data.productID !=2) { %>
This Agreement is legally enforceable against the Borrower in a court of law. In the event that the Borrower fails to repay the outstanding amount, the Lender shall be entitled to pursue all legitimate claims and remedies available through the appropriate legal forum, with all associated costs and consequences to be borne by the Borrower.
<% } %>
DEFINITIONS AND INTERPRETATION:
Unless otherwise stated under this agreement, the following definitions are apply throughout:
“Alternate Payment Channel” means the payment mode either managed by the lender, or by a third party duly authorized by the lender, to receive the instalments and/or other dues from the Borrower in respect of the Loan.
“Applicable Law” shall mean any statute, regulation, notification, circular, ordinance, court order, decree, judgment, direction, guideline, or any other binding action or requirement of an authority that has the force of law in India.
“Automated Fund Transfer” shall mean and include the transfer of funds through electronic clearing service (debit), direct debit, National Automated Clearing House (debit), or any other permissible mode available from time to time, for the purpose of debiting the bank account of a person based on instructions given by such person, either in writing or through any electronic media.
“Borrower” means the person who applies for and/or obtains a loan from the lender (including but not limited to by using any of the Contact Options). The name and address of the Borrower shall be mentioned in the Loan Documents issued to the Borrower for each loan from the lender. For the purpose of this T&C, the term ‘Borrower’ shall include the heirs, executors, administrators, and legal representatives of such person.
“Credit Assessment Fee” means the non-refundable fee charged in respect of the assessment of the credit worthiness of the Borrower for the Loan and shall be paid by the Borrower either at the time of signing and/or accepting the Loan Documents, or disbursal of the Loan, whichever is earlier.
“Dealer” means the seller of the Product.
“Documentation Fee” means the non-refundable fee charged for preparing the documents pertaining to the loan of the Borrower, payment of applicable stamp duty, and other legal charges associated with the loan of the Borrower. This fee shall be paid by the Borrower at the time of disbursal of the loan.
“Due Date” means the date on or before which the Instalment(s) of the respective Loan(s) become due and repayable by the Borrower to lender. The Due Date for each Instalment of the Loan shall be specified in the Loan Documents.
“Effective Date” in respect of each Loan obtained by the Borrower means, unless specified otherwise, the respective date on which the Borrower consents (whether orally or in writing) to obtain the respective Loan from the Lender.
“Eligibility Criteria” means the minimum eligibility criteria set forth by the Lender to assess the creditworthiness of the Borrower, which is subject to change from time to time at the sole and absolute discretion of the Lender.
“Interest Amount” means the amount paid/to be paid by the Borrower to lender over and above the Loan amount excluding the amount paid as the penalty, fees, or any service charges/ fees of whatever nature under T & C of this agreement.
“Loan” refers to the amount of loan approved by lender from time to time as stated in the Loan Documents on which interest is charged to the Borrower.
“Loan Application” means the application submitted by the Borrower to the Lender for applying for, and availing of, the Loan, together with all other information, particulars, clarifications, and declarations, if any, furnished by the Borrower in connection with the Loan.
“Loan Documents” shall means loan sanction letter or loan agreement or written email in respect to disbursement of loan to the borrower.
“Sanction Letter” means the terms of the Loan issued or communicated by way of any of the Contact Options by the Lender to the Borrower, confirming the grant of the Loan to the Borrower, subject to the terms and conditions mentioned in this T&C, the Sanction Letter, and other applicable Loan Documents.
“Mandate” means the instructions given by the Borrower to debit his/her bank account to make the payment to LENDER through Automated Fund Transfer for all the Loans availed by the Borrower from LENDER from time to time.
“Outstanding Balance” in respect of each Loan obtained by the Borrower means the balance of the respective Loan outstanding along with all amounts payable by the Borrower to LENDER including principal amount, interest, fees, costs, charges, expenses etc.
“Person” shall include any individual, Hindu Undivided Family (HUF), partnership firm, company, body corporate, association, society or any other legally recognized entity. The term “he, him and himself in this agreement includes she/her and herself when the borrower is a woman.
“Personal Loan” shall mean the Loan, disbursed by lender directly to the Borrower, the amount of which is not secured by hypothecation of any asset of the borrower.
“Processing Fee” means the non-refundable fees charged by the lender to the Borrower as stated in the Loan Documents for processing the Loan Application of the Borrower that shall be paid by the Borrower at the time of disbursal of Loan.
“Product” means the product which is sought to be purchased by the Borrower and/or sought to be financed by lender.
“Key Facts Statement (KFS)” means the statement issued to the Borrower in the format prescribed by the Reserve Bank of India, summarizing the key financial and non-financial terms of the loan.
LOAN AMOUNT:
The lender shall provide the Loan to the Borrower strictly in accordance with T & C under this agreement and other terms & conditions mentioned in other Documents executed by and/or agreed upon by the Borrower. The amount of the Loan shall be mentioned in the Loan Document provided to the Borrower in case of each approved Loan.
The Borrower hereby confirms and agrees that the lender may disburse the whole amount of the Loan or any part thereof, either in one lump sum or in such instalments as may be decided by the lender.
The lender reserves the right to, and at its discretion shall be free to, recall the entire Loan and all monies due and payable by the Borrower in respect of the Loan including Interest Amount, fees, penalties etc., if any information supplied by the Borrower is found to be incorrect or false or if the Borrower commits any default under this T & C and/ or the other Loan Document including the Sanction Letter executed by and/ or agreed upon by the Borrower.
